strengths: Strong Power BI dashboard experience with quantified impact
Solid SQL and Python ETL and data modeling skills
Proven automation of workflows and process improvements
Experience documenting SOPs and using collaboration tools (JIRA, Confluence)
Demonstrated metrics-driven results and KPI improvements
weaknesses: No explicit Power Apps/Power Automate experience
Limited or no ML/knowledge-graph/ontology experience cited
No mention of taxonomy or metadata governance
DAX and Power Query skills not stated
Enterprise search/content repository architecture not demonstrated
improvement_bullets: Streamlined client onboarding and knowledge flow by building automated workflows in Power Automate and Power Apps, saving 8 hours of manual data entry per week.
Developed and governed metadata structures and taxonomies for client documentation, ensuring consistent content categorization and improved searchability across operational repositories.
Built advanced Power BI datasets using Power Query and DAX to enable self-service knowledge discovery and real-time performance monitoring for stakeholders.
Architected relational database schemas and data models using SQL and semantic principles to support enterprise-wide knowledge sharing and content indexing.
Integrated AI tools to perform automated content gap analysis and trend identification, translating unstructured performance data into actionable strategic insights.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Knowledge Management Specialist opportunity with COGENT Infotech. I am interested in this opportunity because of your 23-year track record of driving innovation and your commitment to building inclusive, data-driven workplaces. What interests me about working for COGENT Infotech is your focus on leveraging diverse perspectives to deliver cutting-edge solutions, which resonates with my own approach to solving complex operational problems through data transparency and accessibility. I believe my expertise in data-driven decision-making and my proficiency in the Power Platform would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by prioritizing the creation of robust, scalable data ecosystems. In fact, at Shine Masters, I identified a bottleneck in manual reporting and developed interactive Power BI dashboards while automating workflows via Zapier; this resulted in a 40% reduction in processing time and a 300% increase in customer acquisition through targeted, data-backed insights. Ultimately, I know that the Knowledge Management Specialist role at COGENT Infotech would allow me to bring my analytical rigor to improving knowledge flow and content discoverability. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst & Operations Lead enabled me to develop my content strategy and documentation skills. I spearheaded the creation of SOPs that reduced new hire onboarding time by 50% by establishing standardized content structures and taxonomies. I am excited by the opportunity to use my background in Python, SQL, and Power Platform automation to assist the team in building semantic frameworks and enhancing knowledge repositories at COGENT Infotech. I know that my technical versatility and commitment to optimizing knowledge assets align with what it takes to succeed in this role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
